Love Alaoui

Love Alaoui is a romantic digital product brand for couples.

Primary product:
- The Better Conversations Deck
- 120 guided prompts for date nights, weekly check-ins, and everyday reconnection
- One-time purchase with account-based access

Brand system:
- Love Alaoui = umbrella brand
- Mochi = softer empathy, check-ins, reassurance
- Mallow = momentum, play, warmth, celebration
- Mochi Mates = the shared ritual world and guide voice

Design and media guidance:
- Premium, cutesy, mascot-led, soft, playful, romantic
- No real-life photography in core design direction
- Prefer character-led, abstract, color-led, or illustrated treatments
- Primary pink accent: #FFC0C2
- Company brown accent: #AC7C61

Core routes:
- / = landing page
- /signup = account creation
- /login = account sign-in
- /checkout/success = post-purchase success screen
- /my-deck = gated ritual home
- /about = brand story
- /privacy = privacy policy
- /contact = support contact

Commerce and access:
- Auth uses Supabase
- Checkout uses Stripe
- Access to the deck is gated by account and purchase state

Preferred voice:
- warm
- intimate
- encouraging
- gentle
- premium without sounding corporate
- playful without becoming childish

Key promise:
- Help couples begin sweeter, softer, more intentional conversations.
